attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY  SMOAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, SMOAIP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) +MAX_VAL  VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY,
       SMOAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, SMOAIP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM (SELECT SAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM (SELECT INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL 
                                                       where CASH_POSTED_FLAG='Y'
	             UNION 
				 SELECT INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS 
                                                       where CASH_POSTED_FLAG='Y'
               ) SAIP,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SAIP.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOAIP,
       (SELECT COALESCE(MAX (VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT) SMVIP
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT SVIP
           WHERE SVIP.SK_INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID_INT = SMOAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID
             AND SVIP.SS_CD = SMOAIP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
 STMOAIP.BATCH_ID                      
,STMOAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
,STMOAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
,STMOAIP.AMOUNT                        
,STMOAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID     
,STMOAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM              
,STMOAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE             
,STMOAIP.BANK_NUM    
,STMOAIP.CASH_POSTED_FLAG                    
,STMOAIP.CHECK_ID                      
,STMOAIP.CREATED_BY                    
,STMOAIP.CREATION_DATE                 
,STMOAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST                 
,STMOAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN                
,STMOAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,STMOAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,STMOAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE            
,STMOAIP.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID      
,STMOAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
,STMOAIP.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STMOAIP.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,STMOAIP.INVOICE_ID                    
,STMOAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID            
,STMOAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE          
,STMOAIP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STMOAIP.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STMOAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
,STMOAIP.ORG_ID                        
,STMOAIP.PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT           
,STMOAIP.PAYMENT_NUM                   
,STMOAIP.PERIOD_NAME                   
,STMOAIP.POSTED_FLAG                   
,STMOAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID           
,STMOAIP.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STMOAIP.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE  
,STMOAIP.REVERSAL_FLAG  
FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
		 SMAIP.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
		,SMAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
		,SMAIP.AMOUNT                        
		,SMAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID     
		,SMAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM              
		,SMAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE             
		,SMAIP.BANK_NUM
		,SMAIP.CASH_POSTED_FLAG                      
		,SMAIP.CHECK_ID                      
		,SMAIP.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMAIP.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST                 
		,SMAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN                
		,SMAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
		,SMAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
		,SMAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE            
		,SMAIP.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID      
		,SMAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SMAIP.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMAIP.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMAIP.INVOICE_ID                    
		,SMAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID            
		,SMAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE          
		,SMAIP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMAIP.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SMAIP.ORG_ID                        
		,SMAIP.PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT           
		,SMAIP.PAYMENT_NUM                   
		,SMAIP.PERIOD_NAME                   
		,SMAIP.POSTED_FLAG                   
		,SMAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID           
		,SMAIP.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMAIP.ACTION_CODE 
		,SMAIP.REVERSAL_FLAG
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL SMAIP where SMAIP.CASH_POSTED_FLAG='Y'
UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		 SCAIP.BATCH_ID                      
		,SCAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
		,SCAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
		,SCAIP.AMOUNT                        
		,SCAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID     
		,SCAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM              
		,SCAIP.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE             
		,SCAIP.BANK_NUM
		,SCAIP.CASH_POSTED_FLAG                      
		,SCAIP.CHECK_ID                      
		,SCAIP.CREATED_BY                    
		,SCAIP.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SCAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST                 
		,SCAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN                
		,SCAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
		,SCAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
		,SCAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE            
		,SCAIP.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID      
		,SCAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SCAIP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SCAIP.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SCAIP.INVOICE_ID                    
		,SCAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID            
		,SCAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE          
		,SCAIP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SCAIP.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SCAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SCAIP.ORG_ID                        
		,SCAIP.PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT           
		,SCAIP.PAYMENT_NUM                   
		,SCAIP.PERIOD_NAME                   
		,SCAIP.POSTED_FLAG                   
		,SCAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
		,SCAIP.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SCAIP.ACTION_CODE 
		,SCAIP.REVERSAL_FLAG
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS SCAIP where SCAIP.CASH_POSTED_FLAG='Y'
	)STMOAIP
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		     WHERE NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT = STMOAIP.INVOICE_ID
			   AND NVI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS ELORG,$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
                         WHERE ELORG.ORGANIZATION_ID= STMOAIP.ORG_ID 
				AND ELORG.GLOBAL_NAME= STMOAIP.GLOBAL_NAME 
                                AND ELORG.NAME = NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VNDR_INV_PYMT_INSTRUMENT NVIPI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NVIPI.SK_CHECK_ID_INT = STMOAIP.CHECK_ID
			      AND NVIPI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT= STMOAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
				AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
)

SELECT 
SVIP.VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY, 
NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
NVIPI.VNDR_INV_PYMT_INSTRUMENT_KEY AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_INSTRUMENT_KEY,
STEXAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_CROSS_RT,
CAST (STEXAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_PAID_DT,
STEXAIP.PAYMENT_NUM AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_NUM_INT,
CAST(STEXAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE AS DATE) AS  VNDR_INV_PYMT_CROSS_RATE_DT,
CASE WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -999 
     WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -998
     WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -997
     WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -996
	 WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -995
     ELSE NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 END AS LIABILITY_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,  
CASE WHEN (NGLA_AC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -999 
     WHEN (NGLA_AC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -998
     WHEN (NGLA_AC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -997
     WHEN (NGLA_AC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -996
	 WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -995
     ELSE NGLA_AC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
END AS ASSET_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(STEXAIP.AMOUNT,0) AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_AMT,
STEXAIP.POSTED_FLAG AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_POSTED_FLG,
CASE WHEN (NGLA_LC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -999 
     WHEN (NGLA_LC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -998
     WHEN (NGLA_LC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -997
     WHEN (NGLA_LC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -996
	 WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -995
     ELSE NGLA_LC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
END AS FX_LOSS_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
CASE WHEN (NGLA_GC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -999 
     WHEN (NGLA_GC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -998
     WHEN (NGLA_GC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -997
     WHEN (NGLA_GC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -996
	 WHEN (NGLA_AP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -995
     ELSE NGLA_GC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
END AS FX_GAIN_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(STEXAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN,0) AS DISCOUNT_TAKEN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE(STEXAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST,0) AS DISCOUNT_LOST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
COALESCE(EAPSA.HOLD_FLAG,'N') AS VNDR_INV_PYMT_HOLD_FLG,  
STEXAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID AS SK_INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID_INT,  
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
EAPSA.CREATION_DATE  AS  VNDR_INV_PAYMENT_CREATED_DTM   ,
STEXAIP.REVERSAL_FLG
 FROM (
	SELECT 
		SMAIPA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMAIPA.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID,
		SMAIPA.INVOICE_ID,
		SMAIPA.CHECK_ID,
		SMAIPA.EXCHANGE_RATE,
		SMAIPA.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
		SMAIPA.PAYMENT_NUM,
		SMAIPA.EXCHANGE_DATE,
		SMAIPA.AMOUNT,
		SMAIPA.POSTED_FLAG,
		SMAIPA.DISCOUNT_TAKEN,
		SMAIPA.DISCOUNT_LOST,
		SMAIPA.ORG_ID,
		SMAIPA.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SMAIPA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		SMAIPA.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SMAIPA.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SMAIPA.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,
		COALESCE(SMAIPA.REVERSAL_FLAG ,'N') AS REVERSAL_FLG
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_PAYMEN_ALL SMAIPA
        where SMAIPA.CASH_POSTED_FLAG='Y'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		EAIP.GLOBAL_NAME,
		EAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID,
		EAIP.INVOICE_ID,
		EAIP.CHECK_ID,
		EAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE,
		EAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
		EAIP.PAYMENT_NUM,
		EAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE,
		EAIP.AMOUNT,
		EAIP.POSTED_FLAG,
		EAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN,
		EAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST,
		EAIP.ORG_ID,
		EAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		EAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		EAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		EAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		EAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		COALESCE(EAIP.REVERSAL_FLAG ,'N') AS REVERSAL_FLG
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS EAIP
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		SCAIP.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID,
		SCAIP.INVOICE_ID,
		SCAIP.CHECK_ID,
		SCAIP.EXCHANGE_RATE,
		SCAIP.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
		SCAIP.PAYMENT_NUM,
		SCAIP.EXCHANGE_DATE,
		SCAIP.AMOUNT,
		SCAIP.POSTED_FLAG,
		SCAIP.DISCOUNT_TAKEN,
		SCAIP.DISCOUNT_LOST,
		SCAIP.ORG_ID,
		SCAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SCAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		SCAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SCAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SCAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		COALESCE(SCAIP.REVERSAL_FLAG ,'N') AS REVERSAL_FLG
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS SCAIP
     )STEXAIP
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXAIP.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT SVIP
		ON (SVIP.SK_INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID_INT=STEXAIP.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID
	   		 AND SVIP.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
             ON (NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT = STEXAIP.INVOICE_ID
                   AND NVI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
	INNER JOIN (select ELORG.ORGANIZATION_ID,ELORG.GLOBAL_NAME,NCOU1.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE 
						from 	$$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS ELORG ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU1
						 where  ELORG.NAME = NCOU1.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE) NCOU
             ON (NCOU.ORGANIZATION_ID= STEXAIP.ORG_ID 
             		 AND NCOU.GLOBAL_NAME= STEXAIP.GLOBAL_NAME )   
    	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VNDR_INV_PYMT_INSTRUMENT NVIPI
             ON (NVIPI.SK_CHECK_ID_INT = STEXAIP.CHECK_ID
                   AND NVIPI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                      ON  (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT= STEXAIP.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
                          AND  NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_AP
             ON(NGLA_AP.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXAIP.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
                     AND NGLA_AP.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                     AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA_AP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_AC
             ON(NGLA_AC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXAIP.ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
                     AND NGLA_AC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                     AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA_AC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_LC
             ON(NGLA_LC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXAIP.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
                     AND NGLA_LC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                     AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA_LC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_GC
             ON(NGLA_GC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXAIP.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
                     AND NGLA_GC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                     AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA_GC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL EAPSA
             ON(EAPSA.INVOICE_ID = STEXAIP.INVOICE_ID
                 AND EAPSA.PAYMENT_NUM = STEXAIP.PAYMENT_NUM 
                 AND EAPSA.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXAIP.GLOBAL_NAME)
